failure_reason: Added focused BodySource execution for original BMF-grammar.bml Compile(String strFileName): ParseStream(strFileName), m_hSyntaxes.Get(GetFileExtension(strFileName)), no-syntax early false without Invoke, hSyntax.Invoke(self,hStream,0), failed-invoke false, and method_invoke dispatch. Initial proof returned partial score because nil? treated syntax records as empty; fixed the branch to require record? syntax before invocation. Final proof returns 16777215 across Go/Rust/TypeScript; BMF grammar body, string methods, Main, StartResultStack, Rule.operator== final return, BML file forward/backward, and native-boundary audit remain green.
